title: Armor Poser Plugin
description: Adds compatibility for the Armor Poser mod
body:
This paper plugin adds server-side compatibility with the [**Armor Poser**]([https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-poser](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-poser)) mod. Armor Poser is a mod that adds a GUI for armor stands for easy posing of armor stands. The Armor Poser plugin listens for incoming packets from the mod, processes them and sends the appropriate responses required for the Armor Poser functionality.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"
